audio_synchronization.description: Visual changes happen on the exact frame the syllable is spoken. If the narrator lists three items, the visual appears instantly on the first consonant of each item.
audio_synchronization.effect: Creates a rhythmic, percussive visual style.

camera_behavior.moves: Camera moves physically backward (Z-axis) to create room for new elements
camera_behavior.parallax: The foreground moves faster than the background during pans

morph_logic.rule: Objects do not just vanish; they compress and become the building blocks of the next object/scene.

effects.emphasis_3d_tilt: Elements tilt slightly in 3D perspective (rotateX/rotateY) when narration references them
effects.camera_zoom: Camera pulls back on Z-axis to reveal new elements, or pushes in to focus on a single element
effects.blur: Background elements blur to isolate the focal point during key moments
effects.desaturation: Elements drain to greyscale to signal failure, rejection, or obsolescence

code.description: High-contrast, and authoritative. A sophisticated dark-mode aesthetic that utilizes motion to explain relationships between linguistics and visual perception. Main visuals are perfectly centered and the canvas is fully utilised

colors.color_scheme_type: utilitarian multicolor — colors are the *subject*, not just decoration
colors.contrast_level: extremely high (pure white text on almost black background)

text_formatting: Title Case for Names (Blue, Wobé, Kpe)

hierarchy.sub_data: Black, Sans-Serif, on white card background, approx 14px

shapes.corner_radius: 0px - sharp corners on all data elements; distinct lack of rounding
shapes.dimensionality: strictly 2D flat, organized in Z-space layers (camera moves, not objects)
shapes.complexity_level: geometric abstraction (color swatches represent abstract concepts)

lines_and_arrows.arrow_tips: none — connections are implied by brackets or lines drawing between objects
lines_and_arrows.curved_connectors: minimal — branching data lines use straight angular paths or slight mechanical bends

animation_style.easing_description: Snappy starts with very long, smooth decelerations. Objects arrive quickly and slide imperceptibly into place.
animation_style.movement_quality: Mechanical and Precise. No overshoot, no bounce, no elasticity.

texture_and_imperfection.secondary: Analog Glitch (1% of runtime - only used for impact/brand reveal)
texture_and_imperfection.glitch_type: VHS Tracking Error, Chromatic Aberration offset (Red/Cyan separation), Scanlines

asset.instructions: Data-first minimalism. Backgrounds must be deep dark grey with a dotted grid. Use absolutely sharp corners (0px border radius) for all rectangles. Preservation of exact data identity colors (Pantone hex codes) is mandatory. Textures should be non-existent except for specific signal noise/glitch effects on transitions.

gradients.notes: No aesthetic gradients on shapes. Elements must be flat, solid blocks of color to represent 'Data'. If a spectrum is needed, use distinct bands of flat color, not a smooth fade.

stroke.notes: Use consistent white strokes for hollow data boxes, connecting lines, and brackets. Stroke weight must not vary. No tapered lines; ends should be flat or square.

shading.notes: Strictly 2D flat fills. No shadows, ambient occlusion, or highlights on the assets themselves. Depth is achieved purely through layer separation (Z-space positioning), not lighting effects.

complexity.notes: Abstract geometry only. Icons should be reduced to their simplest pixel or vector representation. 'Objects' are essentially just rectangular canvases for color data.

filters.notes: Use `feDropShadow` (color #FFFFFF) only for 'active' state highlights. Use `feColorMatrix` and `feTurbulence` strictly for the momentary 'VHS/Analog Glitch' distortion effects on logos or scene transitions.
